title: Desert Scene Tile
description: Handmade decorative tile featuring desert landscape motifs - ocotillo, agave, and mountain silhouettes.

images.alt: Susan shaping handmade desert tiles in the workshop studio

story: Each tile is hand-pressed and glazed by Susan in her Terlingua studio. The desert scenes are carved while the clay is still soft, then fired in the kiln until the colors come alive.
leadTimeNote: Each tile is made to order. Allow 2-3 weeks for completion.
